cases.name: TC-01  No optional charges selected → all optional line items zeroed
cases.error: greenTax should be zeroed: expected 0, got 50

cases.name: TC-02  All optional charges selected → nothing subtracted, total unchanged
TC-03  Only COD selected → only codCharges kept, rest zeroed
TC-04  Only Green Tax selected → only greenTax kept
TC-05  COD + To-Pay both selected (edge: logically exclusive but not validated)
TC-06  Only Hamali selected → only hamaliCharges kept
TC-07  Cheque Handling selected, vendor has 0 value → total unchanged from base
cases.error: No change when vendor has 0 cheque handling: expected 1000, got 640

cases.name: TC-08  Misc selected but vendor has zero misc charges → total unchanged
cases.error: Zero-value misc has no effect: expected 1000, got 645

cases.name: TC-09  Appt. Delivery selected → appointmentCharges kept
TC-10  Vendor with ALL zero optional charges → any selection combo gives same total
TC-11  Mandatory key toggle is a no-op (cannot deselect mandatory)
TC-12  Toggle optional on then off → net zero change
TC-13  Select All adds all 8 optional keys on top of mandatory
TC-14  Deselect All retains only mandatory keys
TC-15  Array.from serialisation round-trips correctly
TC-16  ODA key not in OPTIONAL_CHARGE_MAP → subtractUnselectedCharges ignores it
TC-17  destIsOda=false → odaCharges=0 regardless of ODA checkbox state
TC-18  destIsOda=true → odaCharges calculated regardless of ODA checkbox
TC-19  fuel in optKeys → fuelCharges calculated; missing → 0
TC-20  Math.max(0, total) prevents negative result when large charges subtracted

notes.mandatory: docket, fuel, fov, handling, dacc — always in optKeys, cannot be deselected
notes.oda: Auto-detected from pincode (destIsOda flag); not in OPTIONAL_CHARGE_MAP; checkbox has no effect on calculation
notes.subtraction: Backend calculates ALL charges first, then subtracts unselected optionals via subtractUnselectedCharges()
notes.fuelAndFov: Calculated conditionally via optKeys.has("fuel"/"fov") — but since they are mandatory they are always present
